title: Classic British Toast
description: A simple and delicious British-inspired breakfast dish using rye toast and fried ingredients.
instructions: 1. Cook the bacon in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
2. In a separate pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Scramble the eggs in a bowl with salt and pepper, then add to the pan with the melted butter.
4. Cook the eggs until set, breaking them up with a spatula as they cook.
5. Toast the rye bread until lightly browned.
6. Assemble the dish by placing the scrambled eggs on top of the toasted rye bread, then topping with the crispy bacon.
